description: Irish criminal organization based in Dublin, founded in the 1980s by Gerry Hutch. Involved in drug trafficking, armed robberies, and murders, with operations in Ireland, Spain, and the UK. Known for a violent feud with the Kinahan Organised Crime Group. Assets estimated up to €20 million.

country_links.evidence_quote: The gang has operated in Ireland, Spain and the United Kingdom...
country_links.context: The gang has operated in Spain, conducting criminal activities there.

country_links.evidence_quote: The gang has operated in Ireland, Spain and the United Kingdom...
country_links.context: The gang has operated in the United Kingdom and financed drug gangs there.
